name: german-bundesliga
title: German Bundesliga (football)
description: Match results for every German Bundesliga season from 1993/94 to present, including full-time and half-time scores, referee, shots, corners, fouls, and cards. Updated daily. Source: Football-Data.co.uk.

fields.name: Date
fields.description: Match date (YYYY-MM-DD). Seasons prior to 2018/19 retain the source format dd/mm/yy.

fields.name: FTR
fields.description: Full Time Result (H=Home Win, D=Draw, A=Away Win)

fields.name: HTR
fields.description: Half Time Result (H=Home Win, D=Draw, A=Away Win)
